title: Hair Brush, Paddle Hairbrush, Soft Massage Vent Brush for Men Women, Detangle Hair Brush for Long Thick Curly Hair, Reducing Hair Breakage (White)
features: 【NO-PAIN DETANGLING】AOOWU hair brush cares for your hair and scalp, loosening tangles without pulling or breakage. It has soft, elastic bristles that can gently comb your hair without pulling on the scalp, allowing you to comb your hair painlessly. This hairbrush is suitable for all hair types and is ideal for straightening, blow-drying, and daily combing; A great helper for you to style at home.

【SOFT MASSAGE】The flexible ball-head nylon bristles can reach your entire scalp, pierce thick tangled hair and massage and stimulate your scalp, safely remove dead skin cells, relieve stress and relax muscles, promote blood circulation, relieve hair loss , promotes scalp health and hair growth.

【VENT BRUSH】AOOWU vent brush come with the ventilation hole design, which helps dissipate heat, reduces drying time and prevents heat damage from the blower, reduce the time you spend blow drying your hair, less drying time equals healthier hair, AOOWU hair brush is the best friend for your hair health and styling.

【UNIQUE DESIGN】 The combing hair brush handle is made of rubber, designed with texture and non-slip, comfortable to hold, not easy to fall off, very convenient to use. Also,the handle with hanging hole can be easily hung on a hook or shelf. At the same time, the end of the handle is designed with a magnetic suction function, and the comb can also be hung on metal objects by magnetic force.

【GREAT GIFT】Whether you are a woman or a man, or a child, whether your hair is long, short, thick, thin, curly or straight, AOOWU paddle hair brush exquisite craftsmanship and practical functions make it a perfect gift for your loved ones.
description: Product Description Our ventilated comb features a unique are design to care for your hair and scalp. It has soft, flexible bristles that loosen tangles without pulling or breaking. It can gently comb your hair without pulling on your scalp, allowing you to achieve pain-free combing. Nylon bristles can reach your entire scalp, massage and stimulate it, relieve stress and relax muscles. Promotes blood circulation, relieves hair loss, promotes scalp health and hair growth. The end of the handle of the comb brush is designed with a magnetic suction function, and the comb can also be hung on metal objects by magnetic force. In addition, with a hanging hole, the handle can also be easily hung on a hook or rack.
